Class BaseCalendar

Namespace
QuartzRestApi.Wrappers.Calendars
Assembly
QuartzRestApi.dll

The base calendar for all calendars

[JsonConverter(typeof(BaseConverter))]
public abstract class BaseCalendar

Takes a Quartz.ICalendar and wraps it in a json object

Remarks

Takes a Quartz.ICalendar and wraps it in a json object

Properties

CalendarBase

The base of the calendar

[JsonPropertyName("CalendarBase")]
[JsonIgnore(Condition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingDefault)]
public string CalendarBase { get; }

Property Value

string

Description

The description of the calendar

[JsonPropertyName("Description")]
[JsonIgnore(Condition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingDefault)]
public string Description { get; }

Property Value

string

Name

The name of the calendar

[JsonPropertyName("Name")]
public string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Replace

If set to true [replace].

[JsonPropertyName("Replace")]
[JsonIgnore(Condition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingDefault)]
public bool Replace { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

TimeZone

The time zone of the calendar

[JsonPropertyName("TimeZone")]
[JsonIgnore(Condition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingDefault)]
public TimeZoneInfo TimeZone { get; }

Property Value

TimeZoneInfo

Type

The CalendarType of the calendar

[JsonConverter(typeof(JsonStringEnumConverter))]
[JsonPropertyName("Type")]
public CalendarType Type { get; }

Property Value

CalendarType

UpdateTriggers

Whether to update existing triggers that referenced the already existing calendar so that they are 'correct' based on the new trigger.

[JsonPropertyName("UpdateTriggers")]
[JsonIgnore(Condition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingDefault)]
public bool UpdateTriggers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
